title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 62.
content:
There was an Old Person of Rheims,
    Who was troubled with horrible dreams;
    So, to keep him awake,
    They fed him with cake,
    Which amused that Old Person of Rheims.
meaning:
Edward Lear's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Book Of Nonsense Limerick 62."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
